title: Imagine
profTagline: Type a prompt, get an image at your screen's exact proportions and the highest resolution FLUX.2 allows — a wallpaper made for this phone. The key lives on our server, never in the app.
eCredits: Out of credits — top up the FLUX account
eRate: Too many requests — wait a moment
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
